name: SecurityEval
description: 121 Python code snippets with known vulnerabilities, each labeled by CWE ID. Isolated single-function samples — good for testing per-node bug detection accuracy.
format: JSONL with fields: ID (contains CWE), Prompt (partial code), Insecure_code (full vulnerable code)
WARNING: DO NOT EXECUTE — this code contains real vulnerability patterns. Parse as text only.
